phonetic: 藢su藧p蓹藞st瑟蕛蓹sli; 藢sju藧p蓹藞st瑟蕛蓹sli
examples: Simon superstitiously made the sign of the Tree as he looked around.
Avoid superstitiously investing events with power or meanings they don't have.
They had superstitiously brought their idols with them into the battle (probably like a good-luck charm), but dropped them in their haste to retreat.
